cards.en: AT — at the bus stop / at the door / at the crossroads
AT — at school (учишься) / at work / at home / at the airport
AT — at 10 Downing Street / at No. 5
IN — in the room / in the box / in the bag / in the car
IN — in London / in France / in the north
IN the corner (комнаты) ← но: ON the corner = угол улицы снаружи
IN hospital ← но: AT the hospital = пришёл навестить
ON — on the table / on the floor / on the wall / on the shelf
ON — on the bus / on the train / on the plane / on the ship
ON — on the first floor / on the ground floor
ON — on Baker Street / on the main road
IN the car / IN a taxi ← но: ON the bus/train
